---
name: feature
display_name: Feature
description: User-facing capability or workflow change.
---
# Feature

## Problem

What user or product problem should this work solve?

## Desired outcome

What should be true when this work is complete?

## Requirements

- Required behavior or scope item

## Non-requirements

- Explicitly out of scope item

## Constraints

- Technical, product, or timeline constraint

## Acceptance criteria

- Observable condition that confirms completion
